calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-08-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Garland Wilson, Jr. in Propria Persona.

The Court informed Mr. Wilson that what he is asking to probate is not a will, that it is a trust, that it can not probate a trust and strongly suggested that he speak with an Attorney. Mr. Wilson stated that the Trustee is not communicating with him and that he is trying to get the Executor/Trustee removed. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is denied without prejudice to what ever else might be appropriate to file. The Court also informed Mr. Wilson that if he files something else in the trust, it needs to have a new trust case number, and if it is something else that needs to be probated, he should use this case number.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-24-2019 Continued To May-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
